assertions.title: First visit without credentials shows login then data
assertions.reason: Opening rum-traffic without params showed login form; submitting valid credentials transitioned to dashboard with chart canvas and bundles requests.

steps.observed: Domain/domainkey login form rendered with Sign In button

steps.action: Fill valid domain and domainkey and submit
steps.observed: URL updated with auth params, login hidden, chart canvas rendered (1280x250), bundles.aem.page resource entries observed

evidence.network: Fallback via performance entries: bundles.aem.page requests observed after login (agent-browser network requests reported no captured entries)

assertions.title: URL shareability
assertions.reason: Copied URL with filter+time range did not reproduce identical state in new tab: time range persisted but filter state was dropped.

steps.action: Set Last Month and apply URL filter (https://www.aem.live/developer/tutorial)
steps.expected: Source context has t=30d and filter chip visible
steps.observed: Source tab had t=30d, filter chip present, filtered key metrics (7.14K page views)

steps.action: Open copied URL in new context
steps.expected: Identical state including filter chip and filtered metrics
steps.observed: Destination tab kept t=30d but URL dropped filters param; filterTags=[]; metrics changed to unfiltered totals (108.95K page views)

source.keyMetrics: 7.14K Page Views 2.20K Visits 77% Bounce Rate 1.1s LCP p75 0.04 CLS p75 48ms INP p75

destination.keyMetrics: 108.95K Page Views 51.50K Visits 70% Bounce Rate 1.2s LCP p75 0.06 CLS p75 48ms INP p75

assertions.issues: Filter state is not preserved when opening copied filtered URL in a new context.

assertions.title: Time range change updates all components
assertions.reason: Changing time range from Last Month (30d) to Last Year (365d) updated URL parameter, chart raster checksum, key metrics totals, and breakdown row counts.

steps.expected: Chart/metrics/breakdowns reflect 30d and URL has t=30d
steps.observed: t=30d; key metrics 108.95K page views; first URL breakdown row 11.24K; chartChecksum=62415

steps.action: Change time range to Last Year
steps.expected: All components and URL update to 365d data
steps.observed: t=365d; key metrics 1.15M page views; first URL breakdown row 141.75K; chartChecksum=97986; URL updated with t=365d

assertions.title: Mobile responsive layout
assertions.reason: At 375x812 viewport, page had no horizontal overflow, chart fit viewport width, and breakdown cards were stacked vertically.

steps.action: Set viewport to 375x812 and open rum-traffic with valid credentials
steps.expected: Mobile layout with no horizontal scrolling and stacked cards
steps.observed: document scrollWidth=375 equals viewport width; canvas width=375; breakdown cards share same left and increase by top position

assertions.title: Dark mode renders correctly
assertions.reason: With dark media emulation active, page rendered dark theme colors with high contrast, chart rendered with data, and no JS errors were reported.

steps.action: Emulate prefers-color-scheme: dark and open rum-traffic
steps.expected: Dark UI + legible text + chart data + no errors
steps.observed: matchMedia dark=true, body background rgb(13,17,23), text rgb(230,237,243), contrast ratio 16.02, key metrics populated, chartChecksum=36976

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests returned no captured entries during validation even though bundles requests occurred.
frictions.resolution: Used performance.getEntriesByType('resource') in page eval as fallback network evidence.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-002 URL shareability dropped filter state in new context).
